title: senecio evacoides
intro: Senecio evacoides, also known as Groundsel Bush, is a shrubby plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and pungent aroma. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio evacoides include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can be steeped in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
